overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long COHR Daily ETF (COHH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Coherent Corporation (NYSE: COHR) stock, less fees, and expenses. COHRprovides lasers, optical components, and engineered materials used in semiconductor manufacturing, industrial processing, and communications technologies. COHH was launched on May 12, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
